cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1910 · 武斷 統治
cover.subtitle:
토지조사·회사령으로
수탈된 10년.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Japanese gendarme (military police) in dark uniform with peaked cap and long saber at his side, standing rigidly in profile view in a Korean village street. Behind him: silhouettes of two Korean farmers in white hanbok bowing low. Background: a tile-roofed yamen (government office) and a bare measuring stake suggesting land survey. Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson on saber sheath and cap band. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.title: 신고주의
items.desc: 기한 내 미신고 토지 대거 약탈.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 무단통치 시기 헌병경찰·즉결처분권·태형, 토지조사 사업 신고주의·도지권 부정, 회사령 허가제, 삼림령 등 1910년대 정책 매칭이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small wooden land-survey stake silhouette suggesting colonial land policy. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
